infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CompassCHW uses the camera so Community Health Workers can capture credentials and members can upload documents during sessions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CompassCHW uses your photo library to upload profile pictures and share documents during sessions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CompassCHW uses the microphone to record sessions with your consent, for billing and quality assurance.

plugins.photosPermission: CompassCHW needs access to your photos to upload profile pictures and session documents.
plugins.cameraPermission: CompassCHW needs access to your camera to capture credentials and session documents.
